field.subtitle: Define eras, months, and weekdays for this universe. Drag to reorder — order is the sort key.
field.weekdaysSubtitle: The first weekday corresponds to day 1 of the calendar (and to day 1 of any era marked "Resets weekday cycle").
field.name: Name

message.resetsWeekdayHint: Day 1 of this era falls on the first weekday. Useful when the previous era is open-ended.
message.applyPresetConfirm: Replace the current calendar with the {{ label }} preset? Any unsaved changes will be lost.

empty.weekdays: No weekdays defined. Dates will render without a weekday.
